ground_truth.title: Graphic Design Course Online | Shillington Education
ground_truth.main_content: Shillington's online graphic design course offers live classes and flexible study for total beginners, design dabblers and fledgling freelancers. The course is designed to get you industry-ready and kickstart your creative career in months, not years. You'll learn to design by designing, treated like a designer, not a student. The 3-month full-time or 9-month part-time course covers Adobe InDesign, Illustrator and Figma, along with real-world design briefs and feedback from working professionals. Graduates leave with a professional portfolio, personal brand and confidence to speak about their work, with 82% working in design within a year of finishing. The course is co-developed with leading agencies and studios, refreshed every 3 months to teach the latest trends and tools.
with: Get Designer Ready. Live classes & flexible study for total beginners, design dabblers & fledgling freelancers.
GBP £7,450. Celebrate 30 years of Shillington and save £2,500.
82% of our graduates are working in design, the arts or creative industries within a year of finishing the course.
Learn the software that powers the industry: Adobe InDesign, Illustrator and Figma.
Join live sessions online where you'll learn directly from working designers through lectures, demos and creative briefs.
